meta.title: 14 Hours And An Electric Grid - Jason Larsen
meta.description:
Thrilled to welcome Jason Larsen back to the S4 Stage. In this session Jason goes over hour by hour what he did in the first 14 hours of an assessment / pen test of an electric system. It shows how a highly experienced and talented pro would approach the problem and how they could succeed.

At 22:10 Jason goes into a bit of a rant on actor inflation. The analysts are calling anything like what he did APT. He contends that are a large number of people that could do what he did in 14 hours that are not APT. And even knows some people who include code that was previously identified as belonging to APT, into their code so it gets labelled APT and people stop looking further for the actor (false flags).
